originalTitle: This Dividend Stock Has Gained 18% While the Rest of its Sector Went Nowhere. Here's Why.
summary: One REIT is firing on all cylinders and could still have lots of upside.
content: One REIT is firing on all cylinders and could still have lots of upside.
chineseTitle: 该股的股息已上涨 18%，而该行业的其他股票却毫无进展。这就是为什么。
chineseSummary: 一只房地产投资信托基金正在全力以赴，并且仍然有很大的上涨空间。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
